metadata.name: 紳士漫畫
metadata.description: 紳士漫畫 (WNACG) - 日漫、韩漫为主
metadata.author: ManXia Team (移植自 keiyoushi)

network.userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64; rv:109.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/121.0

tag.title: 标签
tag.placeholder: 输入标签名（仅支持1个标签）

actions.code: (() => { const items = document.querySelectorAll('.gallary_item'); const mangas = []; const seen = new Set(); items.forEach(item => { const linkEl = item.querySelector('.title > a, a[href*="photos-index"]'); const imgEl = item.querySelector('img'); if (!linkEl || !imgEl) return; const href = linkEl.getAttribute('href') || ''; if (seen.has(href)) return; seen.add(href); let title = (linkEl.textContent || linkEl.getAttribute('title') || '').trim(); title = title.replace(/<[^>]*>/g, ''); let cover = imgEl.getAttribute('src') || imgEl.getAttribute('data-original') || imgEl.getAttribute('data-src') || ''; if (cover.startsWith('//')) cover = 'http:' + cover; mangas.push({ id: href, title: title, cover: cover }); }); return JSON.stringify(mangas); })();

(() => { const category = '{{filter_category}}' || ''; const tag = '{{filter_tag}}' || ''; const page = {{page}} || 1; let url = '{{baseUrl}}/'; if (tag) { url += 'albums-index-page-' + page + '-tag-' + encodeURIComponent(tag) + '.html'; } else if (category) { url += category.replace('%d', page); } else { url += 'albums-index-page-' + page + '.html'; } return url; })();

(() => { const items = document.querySelectorAll('.gallary_item'); const mangas = []; const seen = new Set(); items.forEach(item => { const linkEl = item.querySelector('.title > a, a[href*="photos-index"]'); const imgEl = item.querySelector('img'); if (!linkEl || !imgEl) return; const href = linkEl.getAttribute('href') || ''; if (seen.has(href)) return; seen.add(href); let title = (linkEl.textContent || linkEl.getAttribute('title') || '').trim(); title = title.replace(/<[^>]*>/g, ''); let cover = imgEl.getAttribute('src') || imgEl.getAttribute('data-original') || imgEl.getAttribute('data-src') || ''; if (cover.startsWith('//')) cover = 'http:' + cover; mangas.push({ id: href, title: title, cover: cover }); }); return JSON.stringify(mangas); })();

(() => { const items = document.querySelectorAll('.gallary_item'); const mangas = []; const seen = new Set(); items.forEach(item => { const linkEl = item.querySelector('a[href*="photos-index"]'); const imgEl = item.querySelector('img'); if (linkEl && imgEl) { const href = linkEl.getAttribute('href') || ''; if (seen.has(href)) return; seen.add(href); let title = linkEl.getAttribute('title') || linkEl.textContent?.trim() || ''; title = title.replace(/<[^>]*>/g, ''); let cover = imgEl.getAttribute('src') || imgEl.getAttribute('data-original') || ''; if (cover.startsWith('//')) cover = 'https:' + cover; mangas.push({ id: href, title: title, cover: cover }); } }); return JSON.stringify(mangas); })();
actions.description: 提取搜索结果（手机版UI，去重）

actions.code: (() => { const title = document.querySelector('h2')?.textContent?.trim() || (document.title || '').replace(/-紳士漫畫.*$/, '').replace(/-紳士漫畵.*$/, '').trim(); let cover = document.querySelector('div.uwthumb img')?.getAttribute('src') || ''; if (cover.startsWith('//')) cover = 'http:' + cover; const author = document.querySelector('div.uwuinfo p')?.textContent?.trim() || ''; const genre = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('a.tagshow, a[href*="albums-index-tag"]')).map(el => el.textContent?.trim() || '').filter(Boolean).join(', '); const description = document.querySelector('div.asTBcell p')?.innerText?.trim() || ''; return JSON.stringify({ title, cover, author, artist: author, status: 'completed', genre, description }); })();

getMangaDetailWithChapters.description: 获取漫画详情和章节列表

actions.code: (() => { const title = document.querySelector('h2')?.textContent?.trim() || (document.title || '').replace(/-紳士漫畫.*$/, '').replace(/-紳士漫畵.*$/, '').trim(); let cover = document.querySelector('div.uwthumb img')?.getAttribute('src') || ''; if (cover.startsWith('//')) cover = 'http:' + cover; const author = document.querySelector('div.uwuinfo p')?.textContent?.trim() || ''; const genre = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('a.tagshow, a[href*="albums-index-tag"]')).map(el => el.textContent?.trim() || '').filter(Boolean).join(', '); const description = document.querySelector('div.asTBcell p')?.innerText?.trim() || ''; return JSON.stringify({ title, cover, author, artist: author, status: 'completed', genre, description }); })();

(() => { let mangaUrl = '{{mangaId}}'; if (mangaUrl.startsWith('http')) { try { mangaUrl = new URL(mangaUrl).pathname; } catch (e) {} } mangaUrl = mangaUrl.replace(/^\/+/, ''); if (!mangaUrl) return JSON.stringify([]); const normalized = '/' + mangaUrl; return JSON.stringify([{ id: normalized, title: 'Ch. 1', url: normalized, date: '' }]); })();

(() => { let mangaUrl = '{{mangaId}}'; if (mangaUrl.startsWith('http')) { try { mangaUrl = new URL(mangaUrl).pathname; } catch (e) {} } mangaUrl = mangaUrl.replace(/^\/+/, ''); if (!mangaUrl) return JSON.stringify([]); const normalized = '/' + mangaUrl; return JSON.stringify([{ id: normalized, title: 'Ch. 1', url: normalized, date: '' }]); })();

(() => { let chapter = '{{chapterId}}'; if (chapter.startsWith('http')) { try { chapter = new URL(chapter).pathname; } catch (e) {} } if (!chapter.startsWith('/')) chapter = '/' + chapter; chapter = chapter.replace('-slist-', '-gallery-').replace('-index-', '-gallery-'); return '{{baseUrl}}' + chapter; })();
actions.description: 构建 gallery 页面 URL
等待页面原始 HTML 返回

actions.code: (() => { const html = document.documentElement.outerHTML || ''; const regex = /\/\/\S+\.(?:jpeg|jpg|png|webp|gif)/gi; const pages = []; const seen = new Set(); let match; while ((match = regex.exec(html)) !== null) { const url = 'http:' + match[0]; if (seen.has(url) || /\/data\/t\//.test(url)) continue; seen.add(url); pages.push({ index: pages.length, url }); } if (!pages.length) { document.querySelectorAll('img').forEach((img) => { let url = img.getAttribute('src') || img.getAttribute('data-original') || img.getAttribute('data-src') || ''; if (!url) return; if (url.startsWith('//')) url = 'http:' + url; if (seen.has(url) || !/\/data\//.test(url) || /\/data\/t\//.test(url)) return; seen.add(url); pages.push({ index: pages.length, url }); }); } return JSON.stringify(pages); })();
actions.description: 从 gallery 页面 HTML 提取图片列表
